narrative:
Cols 33-F (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,067 registered voters, with 66.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.8 percentage points.
